transcript: Speaker A: [drinks tea] Ah! Speaker B: Kya hua? [What happened?] Speaker A: I got a burning tongue. Speaker B: Ye burnt tongue hai. Burning tongue nahi. [This is burnt tongue. Not burning tongue.] Speaker A: Kya? [What?] Speaker B: Arey burning tongue ek bimari hoti hai. Burnt tongue hota hai jab tumne garam chai pi ke jeebh jala li ho. [Burning tongue is a disease. Burnt tongue is when you burn your tongue drinking hot tea.] Speaker A: Theek hai theek hai, mujhe English ache se nahi aati. [Okay okay, I don't know English very well.] Speaker B: Arey AI teachers try kiye? [Have you tried AI teachers?] Speaker A: Wo toh mehnge hote honge na? [They must be expensive, right?] Speaker B: Bilkul nahi. Normal English classes se saat guna sasta hai. Isliye 40 lakh log MySivi pe English practice kar rahe hain. [Not at all. It's 7 times cheaper than normal English classes. That's why 40 lakh people are practicing English on MySivi.] Speaker A: Par time hi nahi milta. [But I don't get time.] Speaker B: Roz ki sirf 15-20 minute ki practice kaafi hai. Bilkul confident ho jaogi. [Just 15-20 minutes of daily practice is enough. You will become completely confident.] Speaker A: Wow! Kaise join karun? [Wow! How do I join?] Speaker B: Ye install ka button dabao aur MySivi app install karo, sign up karo aur practice start karo. Sirf 15 dino me tumhe improvement dikhne lagega. Chalo, shuru ho jao. [Press this install button and install the MySivi app, sign up, and start practicing. You will start seeing improvement in just 15 days. Come on, get started.]
on_screen_text: burning tongue, ye burnt, Burning, tongue nahi, Ek bimari hoti hai, burnt tongue, hota hai, Jab tumne, garam chai pi ke, Jeebh jala li ho, mujhe English, ache se nahi ati, AI Teachers, try kiye?, mehnge, hote honge na, bilkul nahi, normal English, classes se, sasta hai, 40 lakh log, MySivi pe, English practice, time hi, nahi milta, 15-20 minute, ki practice, kaafi hai, bilkul Confident, kaese join karun?, install ka, button dabao, Installed, MySivi app, sign up karo, practice, start karo, sirf 15 dino me, improvement, dikhne lagega, chalo!!, shuru ho jao
summary: A girl burns her tongue drinking tea and incorrectly calls it a 'burning tongue'. An AI voice corrects her grammar and introduces MySivi as an affordable, quick way to practice English. The ad ends with a call-to-action to install the app and start practicing.
